moves.notesEn: Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or block

moves.notesEn: Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or blockForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.notesEn: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state when the first attack hits a mid-air opponent

moves.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
moves.nameJa: しゃがみ強K（元伝暗殺蹴）
moves.notes: ※ヒット・ガード時、行雲流水でキャンセル可能　パニッシュカウンター時ダウン時間増加、ハードノックダウン空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: * Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or blockKnockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard KnockdownForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.notesEn: * Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or blockCauses a crumple stun when the attack lands as a Punish CounterForces a juggle state when the attack lands as a Punish Counter on a mid-air opponentConsidered airborne from frames 6 - 28

moves.name: Serenity Stream
moves.notes: 必殺技キャンセル可能な通常技・特殊技からキャンセル発動可能「行雲流水」中に、再度同じコマンドを入力する事で動作を中断可動作15F～各種派生技にキャンセル可能・ガード可能下方向を入力し続けると動作を継続する
moves.notesEn: Can be canceled by any normal or unique attack that is consideres special-cancelableDuring Serenity Stream, input the same command again to cancel the technique.Can be canceled into any branching attacks from frame 15 of the technique, as well as blockPosition can be held by continually pressing down

moves.name: Orchid Palm
moves.notes: ※行雲流水を継続した場合の数値硬直17F以降はガード可能
moves.notesEn: * Values represent if Serenity Stream is heldCan start blocking from frame 17 of recovery

moves.name: Snake Strike
moves.notes: ※行雲流水を継続した場合の数値硬直20F目はガード可能な硬直
moves.notesEn: * Values represent if Serenity Stream is heldCan start blocking from frame 20 of recovery

moves.name: Lotus Fist
moves.notes: ※初段が空振り時のみ2段目が中段判定
moves.notesEn: *Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

moves.name: Forward Strike
moves.notes: ※行雲流水を継続した場合の数値硬直13F目はガード可能な硬直
moves.notesEn: * Values represent if Serenity Stream is heldCan start blocking from frame 13 of recovery

moves.notesEn: * Values represent if Serenity Stream is heldCan start blocking from frame 23 of recovery

moves.notes: ※ヒット時のみジャンプキャンセル可能
moves.notesEn: * Can only be canceled into a jump if the attack hits

moves.name: L Hundred Lightning Kicks
moves.notes: 2段目のみSA3/CAでキャンセル可能最終段パニッシュカウンター時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: Only the 2nd hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical ArtForces a juggle state when the final hit lands as a Punish Counter

moves.name: M Hundred Lightning Kicks
moves.notes: 3段目のみSA3/CAでキャンセル可能
moves.notesEn: Only the 3rd hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art

moves.name: H Hundred Lightning Kicks

moves.notesEn: Only the 4th hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art

moves.name: OD Hundred Lightning Kicks

moves.notesEn: Only the 5th hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical ArtForces a crumple state when the final hit lands as a Punish CounterCan transition into Lightning Kick Barrage either on hit or block

moves.notesEn: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10Considered airborne from frames 8 - 45

moves.name: SA1 Kikosho
moves.notes: 1-7　打撃・投げに対して無敵最低保障ダメージ30％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
moves.notesEn: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 7Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: SA1 Aerial Kikosho
moves.notes: 最低保障ダメージ30％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
moves.notesEn: Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: SA2 Hoyoku-sen
moves.notes: 1-12F　完全無敵最低保障ダメージ40％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※最終段ヒット時のみジャンプキャンセル可能
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 12Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterThe final hit can be canceled into a jump

moves.name: SA3 Soten Ranka
moves.notes: 1-9F　完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 9Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter*Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: CA Soten Ranka
moves.notes: 1-9F　完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 9Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter*Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: Koshuto
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Taiji Fan
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Ryuseiraku
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Backward Dash
moves.notes: 1-15F　投げ無敵
moves.notesEn: Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 15

moves.name: Drive Impact: Hosen Kick
moves.nameJa: ドライブインパクト（鳳閃脚）
moves.notes: 1-27F　 アーマー判定（2回）パニッシュカウンター、もしくはアーマー成立後にヒットで以下の性能変化・地上ヒット膝崩れ・空中ヒットきりもみダウン・SAゲージ3000増加
moves.notesEn: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while blocking): Hoyoku Kick
moves.nameJa: [ガード時]ドライブリバーサル（鳳翼脚）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-22F　完全無敵ヒット時硬直が7F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 227 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while recovering): Hoyoku Kick
moves.nameJa: [起き上がり時]ドライブリバーサル（鳳翼脚）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-20F 完全無敵ヒット時硬直7F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 207 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: ※1 動作の4F目からドライブラッシュでキャンセル可※2 ボタンホールドでパリィの持続を延長可硬直部分はガードのみ可動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.notesEn: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

moves.name: Perfect Parry (strike)
moves.notes: 相手の攻撃に対応した方向入力を行った状態でパリィを入力し、入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する（上段/中段攻撃に対して←方向、下段攻撃に対しては↙方向)方向が正しくなかった場合は通常のドライブパリィとなり、追加でDゲージが3000増加する硬直終了から5Fの間完全無敵 （パリィを継続した場合は無敵にならない）ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Perfect Parry (projectile)
moves.nameJa: ジャストパリィ（飛び道具）
moves.notes: パリィを入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する暗転演出が入らないジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Parry Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: パリィドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転10F※動作9F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　24F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

moves.name: Cancel Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: キャンセルドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転9F※動作10F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　25F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
